prompt_inputs.goal: Muscle recovery and strength gains with high protein intake and optimal meal timing around weightlifting training

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day with pre and post-workout nutrition timing
Protein content is high (minimum 2.0g per kg bodyweight) across all meals for muscle recovery
Macronutrient ratios support strength training (protein-focused with adequate carbs and fats)
Meals are practical, compact, and concise without excessive detail
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) needing protein-dense meals for muscle recovery with specific macro ratios and meal timing around training

prompt_inputs.goal: Lose 2 kg over 4 weeks while maintaining strength and performance for competition
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegetarian, no nuts or tree nuts

solution_criteria: Creates a calorie deficit meal plan (approximately 300-500 kcal below maintenance) appropriate for safe weight loss in athletes
Includes adequate protein (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight) from vegetarian sources to preserve muscle mass
Incorporates micronutrient-dense foods (iron, calcium, magnesium, B vitamins) critical for a vegetarian athlete
All meals and snacks are nut-free and the plan is presented as a single day format suitable for replication
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-conscious athlete (gymnast or boxer) requiring calorie deficit while maintaining performance nutrition and micronutrient density

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon preparation with carbohydrate loading and optimal hydration for high-endurance performance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrates comprising 55-65% of total intake
Includes 4-5 eating occasions with hydration strategy integrated throughout the day
Compact format presenting all meals and hydration guidance in 1 day structure
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ daily calories with emphasis on carbohydrate loading and hydration strategies
